title: lens culinaris var. disperma
intro: Lens culinaris var. disperma, also known as the micro or small seeded lentil, is a variant of the Lens culinaris plant, which is a type of legume. It is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high antioxidant content and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lens culinaris var. disperma include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include powder, capsules, and tea, often consumed to reap its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
